# **Overview** 

This is a combination of these analyses used for loop. Code is a combination of Daniela and Shuyings code. Might add Nicks later


Below is a list of sections included here. Including summaries of the white matter analyses and completed figures.

    * My general hypothesis is going to be focused on general somatosensory regions and the dorsal attention network. General approach : for the Schaefar atlas is to take the average for each ROI network and not do each individual parcellation.Do correlation between each parcellation and variable and then average by network.

# <span style="color: darkblue;">Methods </span>  {.tabset .tabset-pills} 

## **Participants** 
### Behavior
  * there were 108 participants in total who completed the LOOP task. 
  * 55 midlife adults 
      * Men = 23
      * Women = 31
      * Stage
          * Pre = 13
          * Peri = 10 
          * Post = 9
      
  * 52 young adults 
      * Men = 27
      * Women = 25
      
      <br>
      

  
### Behavior and T1
  
of the 55 midlife subjects, 45 of them completed a scan but 1 subject (372) is being excluded because of a cyst in the back of his head    
   
  * 44 midlife adults 
    * Men = 17
    * Women = 26
    * Stage
        * Pre = 14
        * Peri = 7
        * Post = 7
      
  * 32 young adults 
      * Men = 21
      * Women = 11

### Behavior and Diffusion
  
Of the 45 with a T1 scan completed,  3 did not have a diffusion scan 

  * 42 midlife adults 
      * Men = 17
      * Women = 25
      * Stage
          * Pre = 11
          * Peri = 7 
          * Post = 7
<br>

Of the 32 with a T1 scan completed, 4 did not complete a diffusion scan  

  * 28 young adults 
      * Men = 27
      * Women = 25
  
### Behavior and High REs

  * 28 midlife adults 
    * Men = 11
    * Women = 16
      
  * 14 young adults  
    * Men = 8
    * Women = 6
    
  
  
  
  
<br><br><br><br><br>
 
 <hr>
  
## **Scan parameters** 

  * Locations from UCSB and UCI
  
<br><br><br><br><br>

<hr>

## **QSIprep** 

  * Version used: 0.16.0RC3

  * The following parameters were used
    * dwi_denoise_window **5** 
    * hmc_model **3dSHORE** 
    * hmc-transform **Rigid** 
    * shoreline_iters **2**
<br><br><br><br><br>

<hr>


## **DSI Studio**

  * Version and tags used via singularity container: **chen-2024-05-22**
  
  * **Parameters** 
    * T-threshold = 2.5
    * Length = 25
    * Permutation = 4,000
    * pruning 4

<br><br><br><br><br>

<hr>

## **Connectronomy analysis methods write up**
<br>

A diffusion spectrum imaging scheme was used, and a total of 128 diffusion sampling were acquired.  
The maximum b-value was 4990 s/mm². The in-plane resolution was 1.8 mm. The slice thickness wasc1.8 mm. The accuracy of b-table orientation was examined by comparing fiber orientations with those of a population-averaged template (Yeh et al. Neuroimage, 2018). The b-table was flipped by 
The diffusion data were reconstructed in the MNI space using q-space diffeomorphic reconstruction
(Yeh et al., Neuroimage, 58(1):91-9, 2011) to obtain the spin distribution function (Yeh et al., IEEE TMI, ;29(9):1626-35, 2010).  A diffusion sampling length ratio of 1.25 was used. The output resolution in diffeomorphic reconstruction was 1.8 mm isotropic. The tensor metrics were calculated using DWI with b-value lower than 1750 s/mm². The quantitative anisotropy was extracted as the local connectome fingerprint (LCF, Yeh et al. PLoS Comput Biol 12(11): e1005203) and used in the connectometry analysis.</p>
<br>

Diffusion MRI connectometry (Yeh et al. NeuroImage 125 (2016): 162-171) was used to derive the correlational tractography that has QA, MD, AD, and RD correlated with Maze Accuracy and path efficiency. A nonparametric Spearman partial correlation was used to derive the correlation, and the effect of sex, age_scan_years, and repo_status was removed using a multiple regression model. The total number of subjects varied on analysis (See Analyses and Final sample sizes above). A T-score threshold of 2.5 was assigned and tracked using a deterministic fiber tracking algorithm (Yeh et al. PLoS ONE 8(11): e80713, 2013) to obtain correlational tractography. A seeding region was placed at whole brain (39,49,29) .
<br>

 The tracks were filtered by topology-informed pruning (Yeh et al. Neurotherapeutics, 16(1), 52-58, 2019) with 4 iteration(s). A length threshold of 25 voxel distance was used to select tracks. To estimate the false discovery rate, a total of 4000 randomized permutations were applied to the group label to obtain the null distribution of the track length.</p>

<br><br><br><br><br><br>

<hr>

## Behavior 
* group differences?

## Hormones

Shapiro-Wilk normality tests were conducted to assess violations of normality of the independent and dependent variables before conducting correlations between spatial navigation dependent variables and sex hormones. To control for chronological age while assessing the relationship between sex steroid hormones and navigational strategy, partial Spearman rank correlations were conducted if the Shapiro-Wilk normality tests were statistically significant (p < 0.05); otherwise, Pearson correlations were conducted. Based on existing evidence of sex hormones’ influence on navigation from the animal literature and strong a priori predictions that estradiol would be positively associated with navigation performance, and follicle-stimulating hormone would show an opposing effect, we conducted one-tailed analyses for these tests, controlling for chronological age. Two-tailed analyses were used for hormones without a strong a priori hypothesis (progesterone, testosterone). Men and women were analyzed separately. For men, we conducted a one-tailed correlation for testosterone to be in the positive direction, while we conducted a two-tailed correlation for testosterone for women. 

## Hippocampal Subfields

** notes as of 2025 **
- T1 HP volume extracted using freesurfer recon all.
- Corrected using TIV from free surfer 

Total hippocampus (from T1-weighted whole brain scans) and hippocampal subfield volumes were corrected using participant’s total intracranial volume (TIV) to remove size
Figure 4.1. Investigating volumetric differences using segmentation of the medial temporal lobe and total hippocampus region. (A) Sample slice of the medial temporal lobe cortex and hippocampus segmented into hippocampal subfields using the Automatic Segmentation of Hippocampal Subfields software. Labeled subfields include: CA1 (cornu ammonis), CA2/3, DG (dentate gyrus), SUB (subiculum), ERC (entorhinal cortex), PRC (perirhinal cortex), and PHC (parahippocampal cortex). Total hippocampus is computed by aggregating subfields CA1, CA2/3, DG, and SUB. Medial temporal lobe is computed by aggregating all the subfields. (B) Women (n = 74, M = 0.56) tend to have larger T1 total hippocampal volume than men (n = 32, M = 0.48; t(68) = 9.72, p < 0.001). Boxplot endpoints indicate the 25th and 75th percentile, and the black line within the boxplot indicates the median value while the black point within the boxplot indicates the mean value. p-values: *** p < 0.001.
<br> 

bias in comparisons. In addition to the total hippocampal volume from the T1-weighted scans, another measure of total hippocampal volume from the T2-weighted hippocampal subfield scans was calculated by taking the sum of the CA1, CA2/3, dentate gyrus, and subiculum subfield volumes after adjusted for TIV. These structures make up the hippocampus region based on the anatomical components of the medial temporal lobe system (Squire et al., 2004; Squire & Zola-Morgan, 1991). An average of the left and right grey matter volume (mm3) for the total hippocampus and the individual subfields was used for analysis. For all the statistical tests mentioned, corrections for multiple comparisons were performed using Benjamini, Hochberg, and Yekutieli p-adjustments to control the false discovery rate.

# Results

Reading in our main LOOP CSV and creating large dataframes for midlife and young. 

```{r reading in our CSVs, echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE}
workingdir <- "/Users/danielacossio/Documents/Chrastil_Lab/Projects/SNAG/LOOP"



#workingdir <- "/Users/danielacossio/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-dcossio1@uci.edu/Other computers/My iMac/Chrastil_Lab/Projects/SNAG/LOOP"

outputdir <- paste0(workingdir,"/Figs")

LOOP_raw_df <- read_csv(paste0(workingdir,"/LOOP_all_data.csv")) %>%  filter(loop_useable=="Yes")

midlife_raw_df <- LOOP_raw_df %>% filter(age_group=="Midlife")  %>% filter(subject_id != 372) # Excluding these 372 because they had a brain worm or something  #53

young_raw_df <- LOOP_raw_df %>% filter(age_group=="Young") 


all_cleaned_loop <- LOOP_raw_df %>%  filter(!is.na(eTIV)) %>% filter(subject_id != 372) # all subjects that completed some type of scan 

young_cleaned_df <- all_cleaned_loop %>% filter(age_group=="Young") 

midlife_cleaned_df <- all_cleaned_loop %>% filter(age_group=="Midlife")

mid_female_cleaned_df <- midlife_cleaned_df %>% filter(sex =="Female")

mid_male_cleaned_df <- midlife_cleaned_df %>% filter(sex =="Male")
```


<br>

## Behavior 

### Extracting summary stats

Young adult summer stats
```{r, summary stats for young adults with useable behavior}
young_cleaned_df  %>%
  #group_by(sex) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    `Mean Age` = round(mean(age_spatial_years), digits = 2),
    SD = round(sd(age_spatial_years), digits = 2),
    AE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_ae_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    `Angular Error` = round(mean(loop_ae_avg_degree , na.rm = TRUE), digits = 2),
    PE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_pe_rad3_m,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    PE_avg = round(mean(loop_pe_avg_m,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    DT_rad3 = round(mean(loop_de_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    `Degrees Traveled` = round(mean(loop_de_avg_degree, na.rm = TRUE), digits = 2)
  ) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  knitr::kable(.) %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "600px", height = "200")
```

<br>

midlife adults summary stats
```{r, summary stats for mid adults with useable behavior}
midlife_cleaned_df  %>% 
  #group_by(sex) %>% 
summarize(
    n = n(),
    `Mean Age` = round(mean(age_spatial_years), digits = 2),
    SD = round(sd(age_spatial_years), digits = 2),
    AE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_ae_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    `Angular Error` = round(mean(loop_ae_avg_degree , na.rm = TRUE), digits = 2),
    PE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_pe_rad3_m,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    PE_avg = round(mean(loop_pe_avg_m,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    DT_rad3 = round(mean(loop_de_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
    `Degrees Traveled` = round(mean(loop_de_avg_degree, na.rm =TRUE), digits = 2)) %>% as.data.frame() %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "600px", height = "200")
```

### ANOVA 

#### <span style="text-decoration:underline">Using all subjects regardless of exclusion</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

SO no age effect but there is a sex effect essentially replicating what shuying found in her original analysis. 

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex; "}

:::{}

**Average**  

Sex is a  significant facotr mediating degrees traveled

```{r}
summary(aov(loop_de_avg_degree ~ age_group * sex, data =LOOP_raw_df))
```

```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
ggboxplot(LOOP_raw_df, x = "age_group", y = "loop_de_avg_degree", color = "sex",
          palette = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800"))
```

<br>
<br>

:::

:::{}
**Radius 3**

Sex is a  significant factor mediating degrees traveled

```{r}
summary(aov(loop_de_rad3_degree ~ age_group * sex, data =LOOP_raw_df))
```

```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
ggboxplot(LOOP_raw_df, x = "age_group", y = "loop_de_rad3_degree", color = "sex",
          palette = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800"))
```

### T test {.tabset .tabset-pills}


#### Degrees traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{}
**Average**

- No significant difference between young and midlife adults (p = 0.6572)
```{r}
t.test(midlife_cleaned_df$loop_de_avg_degree, young_cleaned_df$loop_de_avg_degree, paired=FALSE)
```
<br>

```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

all_cleaned_loop %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(age_group, levels = c("Young", "Midlife")),
  y = loop_de_avg_degree,
  fill = age_group
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 1,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.3, size = 8) +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .2),size=2)+
  #geom_point(size=2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7d4c5a", "#997C5C")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Age Group") +
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      #hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1 , 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
```

```{r, TIFF loop_ageDiff_avgDT_20x15, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/loop_ageDiff_avgDT_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

all_cleaned_loop %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(age_group, levels = c("Young", "Midlife")),
  y = loop_de_avg_degree,
  fill = age_group
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 0,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .1),size=14) +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7d4c5a", "#997C5C"))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Young", "Midlife")) +
  xlab("Age group") +
  ylab("Degrees Traveled (°)")  +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())
```

#### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}
:::{}
**Average**  

- No significant difference between young and midlife adults (p = 0.078)
```{r, warning=FALSE}
wilcox.test(midlife_cleaned_df$loop_ae_avg_degree, young_cleaned_df$loop_ae_avg_degree, paired=FALSE)
```
<br>

```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

all_cleaned_loop %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(age_group, levels = c("Young", "Midlife")),
  y = loop_ae_avg_degree,
  fill = age_group
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 1,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.3, size = 8) +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .2),size=2)+
  #geom_point(size=2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7d4c5a", "#997C5C")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Age Group") +
  ylab("Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      #hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1 , 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
```

```{r,TIFF loop_ageDiff_avgAE_20x15 ,warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/loop_ageDiff_avgAE_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

all_cleaned_loop %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(age_group, levels = c("Young", "Midlife")),
  y = loop_ae_avg_degree,
  fill = age_group
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 0,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .1),size=14) +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7d4c5a", "#997C5C"))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 25)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Young", "Midlife")) +
  xlab("Age group") +
  ylab("Angular Error (°)")  +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",

      face = "bold"

    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())

```

<br>

:::{}

:::
::::

#### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}
:::{}

**Average**  

  - Position Error is significantly different between young and midlife (p = 0.007)
```{r, warning=FALSE}
wilcox.test(midlife_cleaned_df$loop_pe_avg_m, young_cleaned_df$loop_pe_avg_m, paired=FALSE)
```
<br>

```{r, out.width="80%",echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

all_cleaned_loop %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(age_group, levels = c("Young", "Midlife")),
  y = loop_pe_avg_m,
  fill = age_group
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 1,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.3, size = 8) +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .2),size=2)+
  #geom_point(size=2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7d4c5a", "#997C5C")) +
  stat_compare_means(label = after_stat("p.signif"),size=6, method ="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Age Group") +
  ylab("Average Position Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1 , 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
```

### sex in midlife comparison {.tabset .tabset-pills}

#### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}
:::{}

**Average**  

  - No significant difference between female and male adults (p = 0.33)
```{r}
wilcox.test(mid_female_cleaned_df$loop_pe_avg_m, mid_male_cleaned_df$loop_pe_avg_m, paired=FALSE)
```
<br>

<!-- plot for html below -->
```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_cleaned_df %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(sex, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
  y = loop_pe_avg_m,
  fill = sex
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 1,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.3, size = 8) +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .2),size=2)+
  #geom_point(size=2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#a57c8a", "#2f3c31")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, by = 0.5)) +
  xlab("sex") +
  ylab("Position Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1 , 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
```

<hr>

#### Degrees traveled 

:::: {style="display: flex;"}
:::{}

**Average**

- Significant difference between midlife men and women (p = 0.029)
```{r}
wilcox.test(mid_female_cleaned_df$loop_de_avg_degree, mid_male_cleaned_df$loop_de_avg_degree, paired=FALSE)
```

```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_cleaned_df %>% ggplot(aes(
  x = factor(sex, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
  y = loop_de_avg_degree,
  fill = sex
)) + geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
                  fatten = 1,
                  outliers = FALSE,
                  linewidth = 2,
                  color="black") +
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.3, size = 8) +
  geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.2, dodge.width = .2),size=2)+
  #geom_point(size=2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#a57c8a", "#2f3c31")) +
  stat_compare_means(method ="wilcox.test", label.y = c(500,525))+
  stat_compare_means(label = after_stat("p.signif"),size=8, method ="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 50)) +
  xlab("sex") +
  ylab("Degrees Traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      #hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1 , 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
```

<hr>

## Hippocampal Volume 

-  Need to figure out how many comparisons are included to use the BY correction

### Midlife 

The list below are from shuyings original raw data. We will ignore the old T1.
The T2 here are already corrected for TIV. 

```{r,echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,collapse = TRUE}
data.frame(c(
    "t1_vbm_tiv",
    "t1_vbm_gmv",
    "t1_vbm_wmv",
    "t1_vbm_csf",
    "t1_vol_left_hipp_aal_2d_d1_r",
    "t1_vol_right_hipp_aal_2d_d1_r",
    "t1_vol_left_hipp_aal_3d_d1_s",
    "t1_vol_right_hipp_aal_3d_d1_s",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_dg",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_erc",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_phc",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_prc",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_sub",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_ca1" ,
    "t2hipp_vol_left_ca23",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_dg",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_erc",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_phc",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_prc",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_sub"  ,
    "t2hipp_vol_right_ca1",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_ca23",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_dg",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_prc",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_sub")) %>% `colnames<-`("columns") %>% kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "600px", height = "300px")

```



<!-- Creating HP specific Dataframe : midlife_HP_df -->
<!-- Total N - 43  -->

    
```{r, Creating cleaned DF to work from,collapse = TRUE}
# Let's create a clean df to work with here and include only the columns we want 

midlife_HP_df <-
  midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
    "subject_id",
    "sex",
    "age_spatial_years",
    "repo_status",
    "loop_pe_rad3_m",
    "loop_pe_avg_m",
    "loop_de_rad3_degree",
    "loop_de_avg_degree",
    "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
    "loop_ae_avg_degree",
    "t1_vbm_tiv",
    "t1_vbm_gmv",
    "t1_vbm_wmv",
    "t1_vbm_csf",
    "t1_vol_left_hipp_aal_2d_d1_r",
    "t1_vol_right_hipp_aal_2d_d1_r",
    "t1_vol_left_hipp_aal_3d_d1_s",
    "t1_vol_right_hipp_aal_3d_d1_s",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_dg",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_erc",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_phc",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_prc",
    "t2hipp_vol_avg_sub",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_ca1" ,
    "t2hipp_vol_left_ca23",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_dg",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_erc",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_phc",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_prc",
    "t2hipp_vol_left_sub"  ,
    "t2hipp_vol_right_ca1",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_ca23",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_dg",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_prc",
    "t2hipp_vol_right_sub",
    "Left-Hippocampus",
    "Right-Hippocampus",
    "eTIV",
    "estradiol_scan_pg_ml",
    "progesterone_scan_ng_ml",
    "fsh_scan_miu_ml",
    "shbg_scan_nmol_l",
    "dheas_scan_ug_dl",
    "testosterone_scan_ng_dl",
    "estradiol_spatial_pg_ml",
    "progesterone_spatial_ng_ml",
    "fsh_spatial_miu_ml",
    "shbg_spatial_nmol_l",
    "dheas_spatial_ug_dl",
    "testosterone_spatial_ng_dl"
  ) %>% mutate(avg_t1_hipp = (.$`Left-Hippocampus` + .$`Right-Hippocampus`) /
                 2) %>% filter(!is.na(eTIV)) %>% mutate(
                   avg_t2_total_hipp = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1 + t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23 + t2hipp_vol_avg_dg + t2hipp_vol_avg_sub,
                   left_t2_total_hipp = t2hipp_vol_left_ca1 + t2hipp_vol_left_ca23 + t2hipp_vol_left_dg + t2hipp_vol_left_sub,
                   right_t2_total_hipp = t2hipp_vol_right_ca1 + t2hipp_vol_right_ca23 + t2hipp_vol_right_dg + t2hipp_vol_right_sub
                 )  # N=43

midlife_HP_female_df <- midlife_HP_df %>% filter(sex=="Female")

midlife_HP_male_df <- midlife_HP_df %>%  filter(sex== "Male")
 
```

<br>

**T1 adjust correlations**

Shuying originally did an adjustment using TIV from VBM.

I don't know if shuying and viasakh got the VBM for TIV the same. It looks like shuyings is multiplied by 1000x. 

Due to that, I am correcting using Freesurfer TIV

```{r, midlife Correct for T1v}

#v contains adjusted hip
# 1 Create function for apply to variables
dividebyTIV <- function(x, na.rm = FALSE) (x/midlife_HP_df$eTIV)

# 2 Let's correct by mutating the columns using the TIV from freesurfer

midlife_HP_df_adj <- midlife_HP_df %>% mutate_at(vars(avg_t1_hipp, `Left-Hippocampus`, `Right-Hippocampus`),
            dividebyTIV) %>% 
  
  # multiplying to get proportions 
   mutate(avg_t1_hipp = avg_t1_hipp*1000,
         `Left-Hippocampus` = `Left-Hippocampus`*1000,
         `Right-Hippocampus` = `Right-Hippocampus`*1000)


midlife_HP_female_df_adj <- midlife_HP_df_adj %>% filter(sex=="Female")

midlife_HP_male_df_adj <- midlife_HP_df_adj %>%  filter(sex== "Male")

```

<!-- I need to create a correlation matrix to house all of the results from the correlations so I can correct p values later -->

```{r, create empty data frame for correlations }
midlife_HP_correlations <- data.frame(matrix(ncol=9, nrow=0)) 
```

<br>


**Checking normality**

- Degrees traveled rad3 for all midlife is not normally distributed (p=0.04) and degrees traveled for men only ( p = 0.0001979)
- Position error was normally distributed for all groups 
- Angular error rad3 was normally distributed for all groups
-  Angular error average for midlife was not normally distributed (p = 0.0007472) and it was not normally distributed for women only ( p-value = 0.004246)
```{r, checkin midlife normality,message=FALSE}


#Creating an empty table to put everything in
normality_midlife_HP <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = 4, nrow = 0)) %>% `colnames<-`(c("statistic", "pvalue", "method", "variable"))

#LOOP: position error
normality_midlife_HP[1,] <- unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_df$loop_pe_rad3_m)) #normal
normality_midlife_HP[2,] <- unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_female_df$loop_pe_rad3_m)) #normal
normality_midlife_HP[3,] <- unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_male_df$loop_pe_rad3_m)) #normal

#LOOP: position error average
normality_midlife_HP[4,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_df$loop_pe_avg_m)) #normal
normality_midlife_HP[5,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_female_df$loop_pe_avg_m)) #normal
normality_midlife_HP[6,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_male_df$loop_pe_avg_m)) #normal

#LOOP: degrees traveled
normality_midlife_HP[7,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_df$loop_de_rad3_degree))  #notnormal
normality_midlife_HP[8,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_female_df$loop_de_rad3_degree))  #normal
normality_midlife_HP[9,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_male_df$loop_de_rad3_degree) ) #notnormal

normality_midlife_HP[10,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_df$loop_de_avg_degree))  #normal 
normality_midlife_HP[11,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_female_df$loop_de_avg_degree))  #normal
normality_midlife_HP[12,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_male_df$loop_de_avg_degree))  #normal


#LOOP: angular error
normality_midlife_HP[13,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_df$loop_ae_rad3_degree))  #normal
normality_midlife_HP[14,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_female_df$loop_ae_rad3_degree))  #normal
normality_midlife_HP[15,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_male_df$loop_ae_rad3_degree))  #normal

normality_midlife_HP[16,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_df$loop_ae_avg_degree))  # notnormal
normality_midlife_HP[17,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_female_df$loop_ae_avg_degree))  #notnormal
normality_midlife_HP[18,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(midlife_HP_male_df$loop_ae_avg_degree))  #no

normality_midlife_HP$pvalue <-round(as.numeric(normality_midlife_HP$pvalue), digits = 3)

normality_midlife_HP$statistic <-round(as.numeric(normality_midlife_HP$statistic), digits = 3)

normality_midlife_HP$statistic <-round(as.numeric(normality_midlife_HP$statistic), digits = 3)

normality_midlife_HP$variable <- normality_midlife_HP$variable %>% str_replace_all(c("midlife_HP_male_df\\$" ="", "midlife_HP_female_df\\$" = "","midlife_HP_df\\$" = "" )) 

```

```{r, normality table}
knitr::kable(normality_midlife_HP) %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px")
```



<br>
<br>

**Behavior summarized**

```{r, summarizing hp df}
midlife_HP_df  %>% 
  group_by(sex) %>% 
  summarize(n_subject = n(),
            age_mean = round(mean(age_spatial_years), digits = 2),
            age_Sd = round(sd(age_spatial_years), digits = 2),
            AE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_ae_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
            AE_avg = round(mean(loop_ae_avg_degree ,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
            PE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_pe_rad3_m,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
            PE_avg = round(mean(loop_pe_avg_m,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
            DT_rad3 = round(mean(loop_de_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2),
            DT_avg = round(mean(loop_de_avg_degree,na.rm=TRUE), digits = 2)) %>% as.data.frame() %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "600px", height = "200")

```

<br>
<br>

#### <span style="text-decoration:underline">Total T1 HP volume </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

##### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**  

- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t1 total hippocampus R=0.22, p=0.15

```{r,  warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_avg_m)) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_PE_T1total")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)
```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```

```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t1_hipp,y = loop_pe_avg_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=3)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Position Error at average (m)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

<br>


**Rad3**  

- Position error rad3 is not significantly associated with t1 total hippocampus R=0.11, p=0.52

**Average**  

- Angular error is not significantly associated with t1 total hippocampus R=0.066, p=0.67

```{r, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_AE_T1total") %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)
```

##### Degrees Traveled {.tabset .tabset-pills}

**Average**

- Degrees Traveled  is not significantly associated with t1 total hippocampus R=-0.17, p=0.28
```{r, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_DT_T1total")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)
```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```

```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 50)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled") +
```

**rad3**

- Degrees Traveled  is not significantly associated with t1 total hippocampus R=-0.09, p=0.59

```{r,warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_rad3_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_DT_T1total")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```


```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t1_hipp,y = loop_de_rad3_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=3)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 50)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab(" Degrees Traveled Rad3") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

<br>


::::



####  <span style="text-decoration:underline">Left HP volume </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills} 

##### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Avg**

- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t1 left hippocampus R=0.22, p=0.16


```{r}
broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$`Left-Hippocampus`,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_avg_m, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_PE_LeftHP") %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA") %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")


```



```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = `Left-Hippocampus`,y = loop_pe_avg_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=3)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, by = 0.5)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Position Error") +
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

<br>

##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Avg**  

Angular error is not significantly associated with left hp volume 

```{r,warning=FALSE}
broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$`Left-Hippocampus`,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_AE_LeftHP") %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA") %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")


```

```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE}
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
    stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +

    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),

  )
```

##### Degrees Traveled

**Average**  

DT is not significantly associated with left hp volume 



```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
    stat_cor(method = "spearman")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +

    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

::::


#### <span style="text-decoration:underline">Right HP volume </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills} 

##### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

Right hippocampus is not associated with Loop PE average
```{r,warning=FALSE}
broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$`Right-Hippocampus`,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_avg_m, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_PE_RightHP") %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA") %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")


```



```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = `Right-Hippocampus`,y = loop_pe_avg_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=3)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "spearman")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, by = 0.5)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Position Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




**Rad3**

Right hp is not significant with rad3 PE

```{r, warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}
broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$`Right-Hippocampus`,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_rad3_m, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_PE_RightHP") %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA") %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")


```


```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = `Right-Hippocampus`,y = loop_pe_rad3_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
    stat_cor(method = "spearman")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Rad3 Position Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 24,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

**Average**


```{r}
broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$`Right-Hippocampus`,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "Avg_AE_RightHP") %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA") %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")


```

```{r,out.width="80%", warning=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "spearman")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),

    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),

    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
```

<br>
<br>

#### <span style="text-decoration:underline">Total t2 HP </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

##### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t2 total hippocampus R=0.048, p=0.82

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$avg_t2_total_hipp,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_avg_m)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_PE_T2total")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t2_total_hipp ,y = loop_pe_avg_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Position Error ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t2 total hippocampus R=-0.11, p=0.61

```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
```

##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

**Average**

- Angular error avg is not significantly associated with t2 total hippocampus R=0.11, p=0.56


<br>


##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- Degrees Traveled  is significantly associated with t2 total hippocampus R=-0.53, p=0.005

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$avg_t2_total_hipp,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_T2total")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)


```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t2_total_hipp ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(50, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Use this for exporting tiff for illustrator

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/Loop_T2totalhp_DT_Avg_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t2_total_hipp ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(size=22, colour = "#7e4d5b") + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="#7e4d5b",
             se=TRUE,
             linewidth = 4)+
  #stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = "r", size =14,aes(label = ..r.label..)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 360, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 4 )+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())

```

<br>

:::
:::{}

#### <span style="text-decoration:underline"> CA1 </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

##### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- Position error avg is not significantly associated with CA1 r = 0.08, p=0.67
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_avg_m)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_PE_CA1")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```

```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Position Error ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




**Rad3**  
- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t2 total hippocampus R=-0.11, p=0.60

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_rad3_m)) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_PE_CA1")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)
```

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- DT avg is not significantly associated with CA1 r = -0.52, p=0.00577
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_CA1")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1 ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees traveled ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
# Use this for exporting tiff for illustrator

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/Loop_T2CA1_DT_Avg_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca1,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(size=22, colour = "#7e4d5b") + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="#7e4d5b",
             se=TRUE,
             linewidth = 4)+
  #stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = "r", size =14,aes(label = ..r.label..)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 360, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 4 )+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())

```

<br>
:::
:::{}

**Rad3**  
- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t2 total hippocampus R=-0.11, p=0.61

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_rad3_m)) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_PE_CA23")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)


```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23 ,y = loop_pe_rad3_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Rad3 Position Error ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

-AE is not significantly associated with CA23 r = 0.10, p=0.61


```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_AE_CA23")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23 ,y = loop_ae_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,

      color = "black",

                                linewidth =1 ),

    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

<br>

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- DT avg is  significantly associated with CA23 r = -0.54, p=0.005
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_CA23")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23 ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees traveled ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
# Use this for exporting tiff for illustrator

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/Loop_T2totalCA23_DT_Avg_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_ca23,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
   geom_point(size=22, colour = "#7e4d5b") + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="#7e4d5b",
             se=TRUE,
             linewidth = 4)+
  #stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = "r", size =14,aes(label = ..r.label..)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 360, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 4 )+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())

```

<br>
:::
:::{}

- DT avg is significantly associated with t2 total CA1 R=-0.60, p=0.002


:::
:::{}


**Rad3**  
- Position error avg is not significantly associated with t2 DG R=-0.08, p=0.71

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_dg,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_pe_rad3_m)) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_PE_DG")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)


```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_dg ,y = loop_pe_rad3_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Rad3 Position Error ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

##### Angular Error

**Average**

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- DT avg is  significantly associated with DG r = -0.46, p=0.02
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_dg,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_DG")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_dg ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
# Use this for exporting tiff for illustrator

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/Loop_T2totalDG_DT_Avg_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_dg,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
   geom_point(size=22, colour = "#7e4d5b") + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="#7e4d5b",
             se=TRUE,
             linewidth = 4)+
  #stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = "r", size =14,aes(label = ..r.label..)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 360, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 4 )+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())

```

<br>
:::
:::{}

```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_sub ,y = loop_pe_rad3_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Rad3 Position Error ") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

-AE is not significantly associated with sub r = 0.010, p=0.64

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_sub,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_AE_Sub")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),

    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),

    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

::::

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- DT avg is  significantly associated with DG r = -0.41, p=0.038
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_sub,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_Sub")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_sub ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
# Use this for exporting tiff for illustrator

tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/Loop_T2totalSub_DT_Avg_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_sub,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
   geom_point(size=22, colour = "#7e4d5b") + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="#7e4d5b",
             se=TRUE,
             linewidth = 4)+
  #stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = "r", size =14,aes(label = ..r.label..)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 360, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 4 )+
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -3, size = 60, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 60,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 45,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =2 ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
  )
invisible(dev.off())

```

<br>
:::
:::{}


:::
::::

##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

-AE is not significantly associated with sub r = -0.012, p=0.56

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_erc,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_AE_ERC")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_erc ,y = loop_ae_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- DT avg is not significantly associated with DG r = 0.05, p=0.81
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_erc,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_ERC")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
             color="Black",
```

**Rad3**  
- DT avg is not significantly associated with t2 total DG R=0.09, p=0.68

```{r,}

x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_erc,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_rad3_degree, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_DT_ERC" )  %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA")

x <- x[,c(1,2,3,7,8,9,4,5,6)]


midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#                                 linewidth =2 ),
#     axis.ticks.length = unit(0.75, "cm"),
#     panel.background = element_blank(),
#     axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 3),
#     legend.position = "none",
#     plot.margin = margin(2,2, 2, 2, "cm"),
#   )
# invisible(dev.off())

```

:::
::::

##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

-AE is not significantly associated with sub r = -0.30, p=0.14

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_phc,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_AE_PHC")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_phc ,y = loop_ae_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

**Rad3**  

-AE is  significantly associated with t2 total PHC R=-0.43, p=0.04


##### Degrees Traveled

**Rad3**  
- DT avg is not significantly associated with t2 total DG R=-0.11, p=0.61

```{r,}

x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_phc,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_rad3_degree, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_DT_PHC" )  %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA")

x <- x[,c(1,2,3,7,8,9,4,5,6)]


midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)
```
