```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
midlife_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = t2hipp_vol_avg_prc ,y = loop_ae_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




**Rad3**  

-AE is  significantly associated with t2 total PRC R=-0.09, p=0.68

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_prc,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_rad3_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_AE_PRC")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)


```

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

- DT avg is not significantly associated with PRC r = 0.02, p=0.94
 
```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_prc,  midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_PRC")

midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
```

**Rad3**  
- DT avg is not significantly associated with t2 total PRC R=0.10, p=0.64

```{r,}

x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_df_adj$t2hipp_vol_avg_prc,midlife_HP_df_adj$loop_de_rad3_degree, method = "spearman")) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_DT_PRC" )  %>% mutate(parameter = "NA", conf.low= "NA", conf.high= "NA")

x <- x[,c(1,2,3,7,8,9,4,5,6)]


midlife_HP_correlations <- rbind(midlife_HP_correlations,x)

```


```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```

####  <span style="text-decoration:underline"> Summary </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

**Full Summary**
```{r, full corrleation results for all variables}

knitr::kable(midlife_HP_correlations) %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px")

```

<br>
<br>

**Average Degrees Traveled**
```{r}

midlife_HP_correlations %>% filter(grepl("DT",analysis)) %>% filter(grepl("avg",analysis)) %>% filter(!grepl("total",analysis)) %>% mutate(correctedPvalue = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH", n = 7)) %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px")

```

<br>
<br>

**Radius 3 Degrees Traveled**

```{r}

midlife_HP_correlations %>% filter(grepl("DT",analysis)) %>% filter(grepl("rad3",analysis)) %>% filter(!grepl("total",analysis)) %>% mutate(correctedPvalue = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH", n = 7)) %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "100px")

```



<br>
<hr>


#### <span style="text-decoration:underline"> Hormone Correlations </span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

##### Estradiol

Here I am looking at hormones but only for the LOOP group and not all women with a T1 Scan. SO instead of n =74 like shuying, its n = 26

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**T1 total hippocampus**

Estradiol was not significantly associated with total T1 hippocampal volume ( rs(24) = 0.065, p = 0.75)

```{r}

broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_female_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,midlife_HP_female_df_adj$estradiol_spatial_pg_ml, method = "spearman")) %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "100px")


```

```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_female_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t1_hipp ,y = estradiol_spatial_pg_ml)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method="spearman") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 400, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Estradiol pg/ml") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```


:::
:::{}

**T2 total hippocampus**  

Estradiol was not significantly associated with total T1 hippocampal volume ( rs(24) = 0.065, p = 0.75)

##### FSH

```{r, out.width="60%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
    legend.position = "none",
```

```{r, out.width="60%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
  )
  

```
:::
::::
<br>

##### Progesterone
:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**T1 total hippocampus**

Progesterone was not significantly associated with total T1 hippocampal volume ( rs(24) = 0.20, p = 0.32)

```{r}

broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_female_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,midlife_HP_female_df_adj$progesterone_spatial_ng_ml, method = "spearman")) %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "100px")


```

```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_HP_female_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t1_hipp ,y = progesterone_spatial_ng_ml)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method="spearman") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 400, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Progesterone pg/ml") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

:::
:::{}

**T2 total hippocampus**

Progesterone was not significantly associated with total T1 hippocampal volume ( rs(24) = -0.21, p = 0.45)

```{r}

broom::tidy(cor.test(midlife_HP_female_df_adj$avg_t2_total_hipp,midlife_HP_female_df_adj$progesterone_spatial_ng_ml, method = "spearman")) %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "100px")


```

```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  stat_cor(method="spearman") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 400, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Progesterone pg/ml") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,

      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,

    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),

  )
```

:::
::::




### Young

For young adults hippocampal., we will use freesurfer and VBM. We need to put things into scale with the midlife 
- I need to create a correlation matrix to house all of the results from the correlations so I can correct p values later

```{r, create empty data frame }
young_HP_correlations <- data.frame(matrix(ncol=9, nrow=0)) 
```

Creating HP specific Dataframe : young

Total N - 31
    
    
```{r,collapse = TRUE}
# Let's create a clean df to work with here and include only the columns we want 

young_HP_df <-
 young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
    "subject_id",
    "sex",
    "age_spatial_years",
    "loop_pe_rad3_m",
    "loop_pe_avg_m",
    "loop_de_rad3_degree",
    "loop_de_avg_degree",
    "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
    "loop_ae_avg_degree",
    "Left-Hippocampus",
    "Right-Hippocampus",
    "eTIV",
    "VaisTIV_VBM"
  ) %>% mutate(avg_t1_hipp = (.$`Left-Hippocampus` + .$`Right-Hippocampus`) /
                 2) %>% filter(!is.na(eTIV)) # Need to make sure we remove subj without scan # N=43
  
young_HP_female_df <- young_HP_df %>% filter(sex=="Female")

young_HP_male_df <- young_HP_df %>%  filter(sex== "Male")
 
```

**Checking normality**


```{r, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE}

#Creating an empty table to put everything in
normality_young_HP <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = 4, nrow = 0)) %>% `colnames<-`(c("statistic", "pvalue", "method", "variable"))

#LOOP: position error
normality_young_HP[1,] <- unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_df$loop_pe_rad3_m)) #normal
normality_young_HP[2,] <- unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_female_df$loop_pe_rad3_m)) #normal
normality_young_HP[3,] <- unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_male_df$loop_pe_rad3_m)) #normal

#LOOP: position error average
normality_young_HP[4,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_df$loop_pe_avg_m)) #normal
normality_young_HP[5,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_female_df$loop_pe_avg_m)) #normal
normality_young_HP[6,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_male_df$loop_pe_avg_m)) #normal

#LOOP: degrees traveled
normality_young_HP[7,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_df$loop_de_rad3_degree))  #notnormal
normality_young_HP[8,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_female_df$loop_de_rad3_degree))  #normal
normality_young_HP[9,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_male_df$loop_de_rad3_degree) ) #notnormal

normality_young_HP[10,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_df$loop_de_avg_degree))  #normal 
normality_young_HP[11,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_female_df$loop_de_avg_degree))  #normal
normality_young_HP[12,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_male_df$loop_de_avg_degree))  #normal


#LOOP: angular error
normality_young_HP[13,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_df$loop_ae_rad3_degree))  #normal
normality_young_HP[14,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_female_df$loop_ae_rad3_degree))  #normal
normality_young_HP[15,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_male_df$loop_ae_rad3_degree))  #normal

normality_young_HP[16,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_df$loop_ae_avg_degree))  # notnormal
normality_young_HP[17,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_female_df$loop_ae_avg_degree))  #notnormal
normality_young_HP[18,] <-unlist(shapiro.test(young_HP_male_df$loop_ae_avg_degree))  #no

normality_young_HP$variable <- normality_young_HP$variable %>% str_replace_all(c("young_HP_male_df\\$" ="", "young_HP_female_df\\$" = "","young_HP_df\\$" = "" )) 

```

```{r}
knitr::kable(normality_young_HP) %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px")
```


<br>
<br>

**Summmary Stats**
```{r}
young_HP_df  %>% 
  group_by(sex) %>% 
  summarize(n_subject = n(),
            age_mean = round(mean(age_spatial_years),digits = 2),
            age_Sd = round(sd(age_spatial_years),digits = 2),
            AE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_ae_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE),digits = 2),
            AE_avg = round(mean(loop_ae_avg_degree ,na.rm=TRUE),digits = 2),
            PE_rad3 = round(mean(loop_pe_rad3_m,na.rm=TRUE),digits = 2),
            PE_avg = round(mean(loop_pe_avg_m,na.rm=TRUE),digits = 2),
            DT_rad3 = round(mean(loop_de_rad3_degree,na.rm=TRUE),digits = 2),
            DT_avg = round(mean(loop_de_avg_degree,na.rm=TRUE),digits = 2)) %>% as.data.frame() %>%  knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "200")
```



**Adjust TIV correlations**

Shuying originally did an adjustment. so that's waht we're doing below. First we need to correct the T1 hippocampal volumes for TIV. T1 volumes and TIV are coming from freesurfers recon all. 
```{r, young Correct for T1v}


#v contains adjusted hip
# now we create the function for adjusting by TIV
# 1 Create function for apply to variables
Young_dividebyTIV <- function(x, na.rm = FALSE) (x/young_HP_df$eTIV)

# 2 Let's correct by mutating the columns using the TIV from freesurfer

young_HP_df_adj <- young_HP_df %>% mutate_at(vars(avg_t1_hipp, `Left-Hippocampus`, `Right-Hippocampus`),
            Young_dividebyTIV) %>% 
  
  # multiplying to get proportions 
   mutate(avg_t1_hipp = avg_t1_hipp*1000,
         `Left-Hippocampus` = `Left-Hippocampus`*1000,
         `Right-Hippocampus` = `Right-Hippocampus`*1000)

```


#### <span style="text-decoration:underline"> Total HP</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

##### Angular Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

-AE is not significantly associated with sub r = -0.30, p=0.14

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(young_HP_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,  young_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_AE_T1total")

young_HP_correlations <- rbind(young_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t1_hipp ,y = loop_ae_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

```{r,echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Use this for exporting tiff for illustrator
# 
# tiff(paste0(outputdir,"/Young_T1total_PE_rad3_20x15.tiff"), units="in", width=20, height=15, res=300)

#               formula = y ~ x,
```

:::
::::

<br>
<br>

##### Degrees Traveled

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**



```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(young_HP_df_adj$avg_t1_hipp,  young_HP_df_adj$loop_de_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_DT_T1total")

young_HP_correlations <- rbind(young_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = avg_t1_hipp ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




#### <span style="text-decoration:underline"> Right HP</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

##### Angular Error
:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

-AE is not significantly associated with sub r = -0.30, p=0.14

```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(young_HP_df_adj$`Right-Hippocampus`,  young_HP_df_adj$loop_ae_avg_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "avg_AE_RightHP")

young_HP_correlations <- rbind(young_HP_correlations,x)

```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 25)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = `Right-Hippocampus` ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Degrees Traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```




**Average**




```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}
             se=TRUE)+
```

-AE is  significantly associated with t2 total PHC R=-0.43, p=0.04

**Rad3**  


```{r}
x <- broom::tidy(cor.test(young_HP_df_adj$`Left-Hippocampus`,young_HP_df_adj$loop_de_rad3_degree)) %>% mutate(analysis = "rad3_DT_LefyHP")

young_HP_correlations <- rbind(young_HP_correlations,x)


```

```{r}
x %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "200")
```


```{r, out.width="80%",warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_HP_df_adj %>% ggplot(aes(x = `Left-Hippocampus` ,y = loop_de_rad3_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Rad3 Degrees Traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

## Cortical Thickness 

### Midlife
#### DK atlas 

The DKT atlas i used with freesurfer 
- First i need to create a few cortical thickness data frames
```{r}
# just a data frame to work with
midlife_CT_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")

freesurfer_colnames <- as.data.frame(colnames(midlife_raw_df)) %>% `colnames<-`("freesurfer_rois") %>% filter(grepl("thickness", freesurfer_rois))
freesurfer_colnames <- as.character(freesurfer_colnames[,1])

# now creating a temp df to select just the data for freesurfer
temp_ct_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(freesurfer_colnames)

# creating a new var with updated names removing the thickness
new_freesurfer_colnames <- str_remove(freesurfer_colnames,"_thickness")

# replacing cols
temp_ct_df <- temp_ct_df %>% `colnames<-`(new_freesurfer_colnames)

# adding to updated df 
midlife_CT_df <- cbind(midlife_CT_df,temp_ct_df)

temp_ct_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select( "Left-Caudate","Right-Caudate","Left-Putamen","Right-Putamen","Left-Hippocampus","Right-Hippocampus")

#creating dataframe with all apriori regions
midlife_CT_df <- cbind(midlife_CT_df, temp_ct_df) %>% mutate(
  avg_t1_hipp = (.$`Left-Hippocampus` + .$`Right-Hippocampus`) / 2,
  avg_postcentral = lh_postcentral + rh_postcentral /
    2,
  avg_precentral = lh_precentral + rh_precentral / 2,
  avg_superior_parietal = lh_superiorparietal + rh_superiorparietal / 2,
  avg_superior_frontal = rh_superiorfrontal + lh_superiorfrontal / 2 , avg_caudate = `Left-Caudate` + `Right-Caudate` /2, avg_putamen = `Left-Putamen`,`Right-Putamen`
) %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(lh_postcentral != "NA")

    
# now there's a lot of columns to select here so I'm going to try and make a few list of them so then we can grab by names 

# precentral, postcentral, superoir parietal, superior frontal, caudate and putamen 

FS_all_apriori <- c("lh_postcentral","lh_precentral","lh_superiorparietal","lh_superiorfrontal", "lh_cuneus","lh_medialorbitofrontal","lh_entorhinal","lh_parahippocampal","lh_precuneus","lh_lateraloccipital","lh_posteriorcingulate", "rh_postcentral","rh_precentral","rh_superiorparietal","rh_superiorfrontal","rh_cuneus","rh_medialorbitofrontal","rh_entorhinal","rh_parahippocampal","rh_precuneus","rh_lateraloccipital","rh_posteriorcingulate","Left-Caudate","Right-Caudate","Left-Putamen","Right-Putamen","Left-Hippocampus","Right-Hippocampus")

FS_avg_apriori <- c("avg_t1_hipp","avg_postcentral", "avg_precentral",
  "avg_superior_parietal", "avg_superior_frontal", "avg_caudate", "avg_putamen")
```

```{r, set up DT dataframes}

# Average
midlife_CT_df_Avg <- midlife_CT_df %>% filter(loop_de_avg_degree != "NA")
midlife_CT_df_Avg$sex[midlife_CT_df_Avg$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
midlife_CT_df_Avg$sex[midlife_CT_df_Avg$sex=="Female"] <- 0
midlife_CT_df_Avg$sex <- as.numeric(midlife_CT_df_Avg$sex)

midlife_CT_df_male_Avg <- midlife_CT_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==1)
midlife_CT_df_female_Avg <-midlife_CT_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==0)

#Rad3
  
midlife_CT_df_rad3 <- midlife_CT_df %>% filter(loop_de_rad3_degree != "NA")
midlife_CT_df_rad3$sex[midlife_CT_df_rad3$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
midlife_CT_df_rad3$sex[midlife_CT_df_rad3$sex=="Female"] <- 0
midlife_CT_df_rad3$sex <- as.numeric(midlife_CT_df_rad3$sex)

midlife_CT_df_male_rad3 <- midlife_CT_df_rad3 %>% filter(sex==1)
midlife_CT_df_female_rad3 <-midlife_CT_df_rad3 %>% filter(sex==0)


```

##### <span style="text-decoration:underline">Full midlife sample</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

Here I'm using the full average of the apriori regions so left and right combined 

###### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in FS_avg_apriori) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(midlife_CT_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = midlife_CT_df_Avg[["loop_pe_avg_m"]], y = midlife_CT_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = midlife_CT_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}

cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "300px")
```

:::
:::{}

:::{} 

**Average**

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in FS_avg_apriori) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(midlife_CT_df_male_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = midlife_CT_df_male_Avg[["loop_de_avg_degree"]], y = midlife_CT_df_male_Avg[[ROI]], z = midlife_CT_df_male_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}
cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "300px")
```

:::
:::{}

**Rad3**

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in FS_avg_apriori) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(midlife_CT_df_male_rad3[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = midlife_CT_df_male_rad3[["loop_de_rad3_degree"]], y = midlife_CT_df_male_rad3[[ROI]], z = midlife_CT_df_male_rad3[, c("age_spatial_years","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```


```{r}
cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "300px") %>% row_spec(1, background = "pink") 
```

::::
:::

<br>
<br> 

#### Schaefar Label Names



- First i need to create a few cortical thickness data frames
```{r, creating cortical thickness data frames}

# first, let's create a dataframe with a fiew beh vars we'll need 

midlife_CT_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")


# now lets do some data wrangling to rename all of the schaefar columns by creating a variable with the master DF col names as rows, and then filtering by 17 networks. finally convert to a variable list of chars
schaefar_colnames <- as.data.frame(colnames(midlife_raw_df)) %>% `colnames<-`("schaefar_rois") %>% filter(grepl("17Networks", schaefar_rois))
schaefar_colnames <- as.character(schaefar_colnames[,1])

# now creating a temp df to select just the data for schaefar 
temp_ct_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(schaefar_colnames)



# creating a new var with updated names removing the 17 netowrks 
new_schaefar_colnames <- str_remove(schaefar_colnames,"17Networks_")


# replacing cols
temp_ct_df <- temp_ct_df %>% `colnames<-`(new_schaefar_colnames)

# adding to updated df 
midlife_CT_df <- cbind(midlife_CT_df,temp_ct_df)

```

```{r, apriori lists}

#Scahefer Aprioris

schaefar_apriori_labelnames <-
  c(
    "LH_SomMotA",
    "LH_SomMotB_Cent",
    "LH_SomMotB_S2",
    "LH_SomMotB_Ins",
    "LH_SomMotB_Aud",
    "LH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc",
    "LH_DorsAttnA_ParOcc",
    "LH_DorsAttnA_SPL",
    "LH_DorsAttnB_PostC",
    "LH_DorsAttnB_FEF",
    "LH_DorsAttnB_PrCv",
    "LH_ContA_Temp",
    "LH_ContA_IPS",
    "LH_ContA_PFCd",
    "LH_ContA_PFCl",
    "LH_ContA_PFClv",
    "LH_ContA_Cingm",
    "LH_ContC_pCun",
    "LH_ContC_Cingp",
    "LH_DefaultA_IPL",
    "LH_DefaultA_PFCd",
    "LH_DefaultA_pCunPCC",
    "LH_DefaultA_PFCm",
    "LH_DefaultC_IPL",
    "LH_DefaultC_Rsp",
    "LH_DefaultC_PHC",
    "RH_SomMotA",
    "RH_SomMotB_Cent",
    "RH_SomMotB_S2",
    "RH_SomMotB_Ins",
    "RH_SomMotB_Aud",
    "RH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc",
    "RH_DorsAttnA_ParOcc",
    "RH_DorsAttnA_SPL",
    "RH_DorsAttnB_TempOcc",
    "RH_DorsAttnB_PostC",
    "RH_DorsAttnB_FEF",
    "RH_ContA_IPS",
    "RH_ContA_PFCd",
    "RH_ContA_PFCl",
    "RH_ContA_Cingm",
    "RH_ContC_pCun",
    "RH_ContC_Cingp",
    "RH_DefaultA_Temp",
    "RH_DefaultA_IPL",
    "RH_DefaultA_PFCd",
    "RH_DefaultA_pCunPCC",
    "RH_DefaultA_PFCm",
    "RH_DefaultC_Rsp",
    "RH_DefaultC_PHC"
  )

schaefar_apriori_networknames <-
  c(
    "LH_SomMotA",
    "LH_SomMotB",
    "LH_DorsAttnA",
    "LH_DorsAttnB",
    "LH_ContA",
    "LH_ContC",
    "LH_DefaultA",
    "LH_DefaultC",
    "RH_SomMotA",
    "RH_SomMotB",
    "RH_DorsAttnA",
    "RH_DorsAttnB",
    "RH_ContA",
    "RH_ContC",
    "RH_DefaultA",
    "RH_DefaultC"
  )



```

```{r}
#creating a schaefar df specifically 

midlife_schaefar_df <- midlife_CT_df  %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")
for (label in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
        temp <-
          midlife_CT_df %>% dplyr::select(matches(label)) %>% rowMeans() %>% as.data.frame() %>% `colnames<-`(label)
        
        midlife_schaefar_df <- cbind(midlife_schaefar_df, temp)
      }
```

```{r, set up scahefer dataframes}

# Average
midlife_schaefar_df_Avg <- midlife_schaefar_df %>% filter(loop_de_avg_degree != "NA") %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(LH_SomMotA != "NA")
midlife_schaefar_df_Avg$sex[midlife_schaefar_df_Avg$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
midlife_schaefar_df_Avg$sex[midlife_schaefar_df_Avg$sex=="Female"] <- 0
midlife_schaefar_df_Avg$sex <- as.numeric(midlife_schaefar_df_Avg$sex)

midlife_schaefar_df_male_Avg <- midlife_schaefar_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==1)
midlife_schaefar_df_female_Avg <-midlife_schaefar_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==0)

#Rad3
  
midlife_schaefar_df_rad3 <- midlife_schaefar_df %>% filter(loop_de_rad3_degree != "NA") %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(LH_SomMotA != "NA")
midlife_schaefar_df_rad3$sex[midlife_schaefar_df_rad3$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
midlife_schaefar_df_rad3$sex[midlife_schaefar_df_rad3$sex=="Female"] <- 0
midlife_schaefar_df_rad3$sex <- as.numeric(midlife_schaefar_df_rad3$sex)

midlife_schaefar_df_male_rad3 <- midlife_schaefar_df_rad3 %>% filter(sex==1)
midlife_schaefar_df_female_rad3 <-midlife_schaefar_df_rad3 %>% filter(sex==0)


```

##### <span style="text-decoration:underline"> All</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

###### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(midlife_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = midlife_schaefar_df_Avg[["loop_pe_avg_m"]], y = midlife_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = midlife_schaefar_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}

cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "300px") %>% row_spec(1:3, background = "pink") 
```

:::
:::{}

```{r, out.width="80%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

midlife_schaefar_df_Avg %>% ggplot(aes(x =LH_ContA_Temp ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Cortical Thickness")+
  ylab("Average Degrees traveled") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



:::
:::{}

**Rad3**

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(midlife_schaefar_df_rad3[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = midlife_schaefar_df_rad3[["loop_de_rad3_degree"]], y = midlife_schaefar_df_rad3[[ROI]], z = midlife_schaefar_df_rad3[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "BH", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```


```{r}
cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "300px") %>% row_spec(1, background = "pink") 
```

::::
:::

::::
:::

<br>
<br>




### Young Adults 
#### DK atlas

- First i need to create a few cortical thickness data frames
```{r}
# just a data frame to work with
young_CT_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")

freesurfer_colnames <- as.data.frame(colnames(midlife_raw_df)) %>% `colnames<-`("freesurfer_rois") %>% filter(grepl("thickness", freesurfer_rois))
freesurfer_colnames <- as.character(freesurfer_colnames[,1])

# now creating a temp df to select just the data for freesurfer
temp_ct_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(freesurfer_colnames)

# creating a new var with updated names removing the thickness
new_freesurfer_colnames <- str_remove(freesurfer_colnames,"_thickness")

# replacing cols
temp_ct_df <- temp_ct_df %>% `colnames<-`(new_freesurfer_colnames)

# adding to updated df 
young_CT_df <- cbind(young_CT_df,temp_ct_df)

temp_ct_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select( "Left-Caudate","Right-Caudate","Left-Putamen","Right-Putamen","Left-Hippocampus","Right-Hippocampus")

#creating dataframe with all apriori regions
young_CT_df <- cbind(young_CT_df, temp_ct_df) %>% mutate(
  avg_t1_hipp = (.$`Left-Hippocampus` + .$`Right-Hippocampus`) / 2,
  avg_postcentral = lh_postcentral + rh_postcentral /
    2,
  avg_precentral = lh_precentral + rh_precentral / 2,
  avg_superior_parietal = lh_superiorparietal + rh_superiorparietal / 2,
  avg_superior_frontal = rh_superiorfrontal + lh_superiorfrontal / 2 , avg_caudate = `Left-Caudate` + `Right-Caudate` /2, avg_putamen = `Left-Putamen`,`Right-Putamen`
) %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(lh_postcentral != "NA")

    
# now there's a lot of columns to select here so I'm going to try and make a few list of them so then we can grab by names 

# precentral, postcentral, superoir parietal, superior frontal, caudate and putamen 

FS_all_apriori <- c("lh_postcentral","lh_precentral","lh_superiorparietal","lh_superiorfrontal", "lh_cuneus","lh_medialorbitofrontal","lh_entorhinal","lh_parahippocampal","lh_precuneus","lh_lateraloccipital","lh_posteriorcingulate", "rh_postcentral","rh_precentral","rh_superiorparietal","rh_superiorfrontal","rh_cuneus","rh_medialorbitofrontal","rh_entorhinal","rh_parahippocampal","rh_precuneus","rh_lateraloccipital","rh_posteriorcingulate","Left-Caudate","Right-Caudate","Left-Putamen","Right-Putamen","Left-Hippocampus","Right-Hippocampus")

FS_avg_apriori <- c("avg_t1_hipp","avg_postcentral", "avg_precentral",
  "avg_superior_parietal", "avg_superior_frontal", "avg_caudate", "avg_putamen")
```

```{r,,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# Average
young_CT_df_Avg <- young_CT_df %>% filter(loop_de_avg_degree != "NA")
young_CT_df_Avg$sex[young_CT_df_Avg$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
young_CT_df_Avg$sex[young_CT_df_Avg$sex=="Female"] <- 0
young_CT_df_Avg$sex <- as.numeric(young_CT_df_Avg$sex)

#Rad3
  
young_CT_df_rad3 <- young_CT_df %>% filter(loop_de_rad3_degree != "NA")
young_CT_df_rad3$sex[young_CT_df_rad3$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
young_CT_df_rad3$sex[young_CT_df_rad3$sex=="Female"] <- 0
young_CT_df_rad3$sex <- as.numeric(young_CT_df_rad3$sex)
```


##### <span style="text-decoration:underline">Full young adult sample</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

Here I'm using the full average of the apriori regions so left and right combined 

###### Position Error

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

:::{} 

**Average**

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in FS_avg_apriori) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(young_CT_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = young_CT_df_Avg[["loop_pe_avg_m"]], y = young_CT_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = young_CT_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}

cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "400px", height = "300px")
```

:::
:::{}

```{r}
#Scahefer Aprioris

schaefar_apriori_labelnames <-
  c("LH_SomMotA",
    "LH_SomMotB_Cent",
    "LH_SomMotB_S2",
    "LH_SomMotB_Ins",
    "LH_SomMotB_Aud",
    "LH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc",

  )

    #"RH_ContA_Temp" , this one doesn't exist??

schaefar_apriori_labelnames_averaged <-
  c(
    "avg_SomMotA",
    "avg_SomMotB_Cent",
    "avg_SomMotB_S2",
    "avg_SomMotB_Ins",
    "avg_SomMotB_Aud",
    "avg_DorsAttnA_TempOcc",
    "avg_DorsAttnA_ParOcc",

  c(

    "LH_ContA",
    "LH_ContC",

    "avg_SomMotB",

```

```{r}
young_CT_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol"
)


# now lets do some data wrangling to rename all of the schaefar columns by creating a variable with the master DF col names as rows, and then filtering by 17 networks. finally convert to a variable list of chars
schaefar_colnames <- as.data.frame(colnames(young_raw_df)) %>% `colnames<-`("schaefar_rois") %>% filter(grepl("17Networks", schaefar_rois))
schaefar_colnames <- as.character(schaefar_colnames[,1])

# now creating a temp df to select just the data for schaefar 
temp_ct_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(schaefar_colnames) 

# creating a new var with updated names removing the 17 netowrks 
new_schaefar_colnames <- str_remove(schaefar_colnames,"17Networks_")


# replacing cols
temp_ct_df <- temp_ct_df %>% `colnames<-`(new_schaefar_colnames)

# adding to updated df 
young_CT_df <-
  cbind(young_CT_df, temp_ct_df) 



young_schaefar_df <- young_CT_df  %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")

for (label in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
        temp <-young_CT_df %>% dplyr::select(matches(label)) %>% rowMeans() %>% as.data.frame() %>% `colnames<-`(label)
        
        young_schaefar_df <- cbind(young_schaefar_df, temp)
}
        
        
        

young_schaefar_df <-  young_schaefar_df %>% mutate(
    avg_SomMotA = (.$LH_SomMotA + .$RH_SomMotA) / 2,
    avg_SomMotB_Cent = (LH_SomMotB_Cent + RH_SomMotB_Cent)  / 2,
    avg_SomMotB_S2 = (LH_SomMotB_S2 + RH_SomMotB_S2) / 2,
    avg_SomMotB_Ins = (LH_SomMotB_Ins + RH_SomMotB_Ins) / 2,
    avg_SomMotB_Aud = (LH_SomMotB_Aud + RH_SomMotB_Aud) / 2,
    avg_DorsAttnA_TempOcc = (LH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc + RH_DorsAttnA_TempOcc) / 2,
    avg_DorsAttnA_ParOcc = (LH_DorsAttnA_ParOcc + RH_DorsAttnA_ParOcc) / 2,
    avg_DorsAttnA_SPL = (LH_DorsAttnA_SPL + RH_DorsAttnA_SPL) / 2,
    avg_DorsAttnB_PostC = (LH_DorsAttnB_PostC + RH_DorsAttnB_PostC) / 2,
    avg_DorsAttnB_FEF = (LH_DorsAttnB_FEF + RH_DorsAttnB_FEF) / 2,
    avg_ContA_IPS = (LH_ContA_IPS + RH_ContA_IPS) / 2,
    avg_ContA_PFCd = (LH_ContA_PFCd + RH_ContA_PFCd) / 2,
    avg_ContA_PFCl = (LH_ContA_PFCl + RH_ContA_PFCl) / 2,
    avg_ContA_Cingm = (LH_ContA_Cingm + RH_ContA_Cingm) / 2,
    avg_ContC_pCun = (LH_ContC_pCun + RH_ContC_pCun) / 2,
    avg_ContC_Cingp = (LH_ContC_Cingp + RH_ContC_Cingp) / 2,
    avg_DefaultA_IPL = (LH_DefaultA_IPL + RH_DefaultA_IPL) / 2,
    avg_DefaultA_PFCd = (LH_DefaultA_PFCd + RH_DefaultA_PFCd) / 2,
    avg_DefaultA_pCunPCC = (LH_DefaultA_pCunPCC + RH_DefaultA_pCunPCC) / 2,
    avg_DefaultA_PFCm = (LH_DefaultA_PFCm + RH_DefaultA_PFCm) / 2,
    avg_DefaultC_Rsp = (LH_DefaultC_Rsp + RH_DefaultC_Rsp) / 2,
    avg_DefaultC_PHC = (LH_DefaultC_PHC + RH_DefaultC_PHC) / 2,
    avg_DefaultC_IPL = (LH_DefaultC_IPL + RH_DefaultC_IPL) / 2,
  ) %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(LH_SomMotA != "NA")



```

```{r}
# Average
young_schaefar_df_Avg <- young_schaefar_df %>% filter(loop_de_avg_degree != "NA") %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(LH_SomMotA != "NA")
young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex[young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex[young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex=="Female"] <- 0
young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex <- as.numeric(young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex)

young_schaefar_df_male_Avg <- young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==1)
young_schaefar_df_female_Avg <-young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==0)


```

##### <span style="text-decoration:underline">A priori label names</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

###### Position Error Average


```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = young_schaefar_df_Avg[["loop_pe_avg_m"]], y = young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = young_schaefar_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}

cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px") %>% row_spec(1, background = "pink") 
```



```{r, out.width="60%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% ggplot(aes(x = LH_ContA_Temp ,y = loop_pe_avg_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, by = 1)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Position Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```



<br>
<br> 

###### Angular Error Average


```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = young_schaefar_df_Avg[["loop_ae_avg_degree"]], y = young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = young_schaefar_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}

cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px") %>% row_spec(1, background = "pink") 
```

```{r, out.width="60%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% ggplot(aes(x = LH_ContA_Temp ,y = loop_ae_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 125, by = 50)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

<br>
<br> 

###### degrees traveled


```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in schaefar_apriori_labelnames) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = young_schaefar_df_Avg[["loop_de_avg_degree"]], y = young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = young_schaefar_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}

cor_results$adj.pval <- p.adjust(cor_results$p.value, method = "fdr", n = length(cor_results$p.value))
cor_results <- arrange(cor_results,p.value)


```

```{r,message=FALSE}

cor_results %>% knitr::kable() %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options =  c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>% scroll_box(width = "800px", height = "300px") %>% row_spec(1, background = "pink") 
```

```{r, out.width="60%", warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE,results='hide'}

young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% ggplot(aes(x = RH_SomMotB_Cent ,y = loop_de_avg_degree)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=2)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#4e363e", "#CCBDCA")) + 
   stat_smooth(method = "lm",
              formula = y ~ x,
              geom = "smooth",
             color="Black",
             se=TRUE)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 500, by = 100)) +
  xlab("Averaged GMV Volume")+
  ylab("Average Angular Error") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -4, size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 4, size = 18,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      vjust = -2,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 18,
      color = "black",
      hjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black",
                                linewidth =1 ),
    #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1,1, 1, 1, "cm"),
  )
  

```

```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
```

##### <span style="text-decoration:underline">a priori network names</span> {.tabset .tabset-pills}

```{r}
young_CT_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol"
)


# now lets do some data wrangling to rename all of the schaefar columns by creating a variable with the master DF col names as rows, and then filtering by 17 networks. finally convert to a variable list of chars
schaefar_colnames <- as.data.frame(colnames(young_raw_df)) %>% `colnames<-`("schaefar_rois") %>% filter(grepl("17Networks", schaefar_rois))
schaefar_colnames <- as.character(schaefar_colnames[,1])

# now creating a temp df to select just the data for schaefar 
temp_ct_df <- young_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(schaefar_colnames) 

# creating a new var with updated names removing the 17 netowrks 
new_schaefar_colnames <- str_remove(schaefar_colnames,"17Networks_")


# replacing cols
temp_ct_df <- temp_ct_df %>% `colnames<-`(new_schaefar_colnames)

# adding to updated df 
young_CT_df <-
  cbind(young_CT_df, temp_ct_df) 



young_schaefar_df <- young_CT_df  %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "repo_status",
  "loop_pe_rad3_m",
  "loop_pe_avg_m",
  "loop_de_rad3_degree",
  "loop_de_avg_degree",
  "loop_ae_rad3_degree",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")

for (label in schaefar_apriori_networknames) {
        temp <-young_CT_df %>% dplyr::select(matches(label)) %>% rowMeans() %>% as.data.frame() %>% `colnames<-`(label)
        
        young_schaefar_df <- cbind(young_schaefar_df, temp)
}

```

```{r}
# Average
young_schaefar_df_Avg <- young_schaefar_df %>% filter(loop_de_avg_degree != "NA") %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(LH_SomMotA != "NA")
young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex[young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex=="Male"] <- 1 
young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex[young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex=="Female"] <- 0
young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex <- as.numeric(young_schaefar_df_Avg$sex)

young_schaefar_df_male_Avg <- young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==1)
young_schaefar_df_female_Avg <-young_schaefar_df_Avg %>% filter(sex==0)


```

###### Position Error Average


```{r,echo=FALSE, results='hide',message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cor_results <-
  data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 7)) %>%   `colnames<-`(c("roi", "estimate", "p.value", "statistic", "n", "gp", "Method"))

pcorlist <- list()

for (ROI in schaefar_apriori_networknames) {
  
  print(ROI)
  if(!is.na(sum(young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]])) == FALSE){

    pcorlist[[ROI]] <- NA

  }else{
  pcorlist[[ROI]] <-
    pcor.test(x = young_schaefar_df_Avg[["loop_pe_avg_m"]], y = young_schaefar_df_Avg[[ROI]], z = young_schaefar_df_Avg[, c("age_spatial_years","sex","EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")], method = "spearman")
  temp <- cbind(ROI, pcorlist[[ROI]])
  cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, temp)
  }
}
```

################################################################  


## LM perm cortical thickness (testing)
### Freesurfer

#### Angular Error 
I need to create a data frame where everything is sort of long ways
SO a row for every ROI + subject + Loop AE


```{r}
# just a data frame to work with
midlife_CT_lmperm <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(
  "subject_id",
  "sex",
  "age_spatial_years",
  "loop_ae_avg_degree",
  "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol")

freesurfer_colnames <- as.data.frame(colnames(midlife_raw_df)) %>% `colnames<-`("freesurfer_rois") %>% filter(grepl("thickness", freesurfer_rois))
freesurfer_colnames <- as.character(freesurfer_colnames[,1])

# now creating a temp df to select just the data for freesurfer
temp_ct_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select(freesurfer_colnames)

# creating a new var with updated names removing the thickness
new_freesurfer_colnames <- str_remove(freesurfer_colnames,"_thickness")

# replacing cols
temp_ct_df <- temp_ct_df %>% `colnames<-`(new_freesurfer_colnames)

# adding to updated df 
midlife_CT_lmperm <- cbind(midlife_CT_lmperm,temp_ct_df)

temp_ct_df <- midlife_raw_df %>%  dplyr::select( "Left-Caudate","Right-Caudate","Left-Putamen","Right-Putamen","Left-Hippocampus","Right-Hippocampus")

#creating dataframe with all apriori regions
midlife_CT_lmperm <- cbind(midlife_CT_lmperm, temp_ct_df) %>% mutate(
  avg_t1_hipp = (.$`Left-Hippocampus` + .$`Right-Hippocampus`) / 2,
  avg_postcentral = lh_postcentral + rh_postcentral /
    2,
  avg_precentral = lh_precentral + rh_precentral / 2,
  avg_superior_parietal = lh_superiorparietal + rh_superiorparietal / 2,
  avg_superior_frontal = rh_superiorfrontal + lh_superiorfrontal / 2 , avg_caudate = `Left-Caudate` + `Right-Caudate` /2, avg_putamen = `Left-Putamen`,`Right-Putamen`
) %>% filter(EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol != "NA") %>% filter(lh_postcentral != "NA")

    
# now there's a lot of columns to select here so I'm going to try and make a few list of them so then we can grab by names 

# precentral, postcentral, superoir parietal, superior frontal, caudate and putamen 



FS_all_apriori <- c("lh_postcentral","lh_precentral","lh_superiorparietal","lh_superiorfrontal", "lh_cuneus","lh_medialorbitofrontal","lh_entorhinal","lh_parahippocampal","lh_precuneus","lh_lateraloccipital","lh_posteriorcingulate", "rh_postcentral","rh_precentral","rh_superiorparietal","rh_superiorfrontal","rh_cuneus","rh_medialorbitofrontal","rh_entorhinal","rh_parahippocampal","rh_precuneus","rh_lateraloccipital","rh_posteriorcingulate","Left-Caudate","Right-Caudate","Left-Putamen","Right-Putamen","Left-Hippocampus","Right-Hippocampus")

FS_avg_apriori <- c("avg_t1_hipp","avg_postcentral", "avg_precentral",
  "avg_superior_parietal", "avg_superior_frontal", "avg_caudate", "avg_putamen")
```

```{r}
midlife_CT_lmperm <-
  midlife_CT_lmperm %>% dplyr::select(
    "subject_id",
    "sex",
    "age_spatial_years",
    "loop_ae_avg_degree",
    "EstimatedTotalIntraCranialVol",
    "lh_postcentral",
    "lh_precentral",
    "lh_superiorparietal",
    "lh_superiorfrontal",
    "lh_cuneus",
    "lh_medialorbitofrontal",
    "lh_entorhinal",
    "lh_parahippocampal",
    "lh_precuneus",
    "lh_lateraloccipital",
    "lh_posteriorcingulate",
    "rh_postcentral",
    "rh_precentral",
    "rh_superiorparietal",
    "rh_superiorfrontal",
    "rh_cuneus",
    "rh_medialorbitofrontal",
    "rh_entorhinal",
    "rh_parahippocampal",
    "rh_precuneus",
    "rh_lateraloccipital",
    "rh_posteriorcingulate",
    "Left-Caudate",
    "Right-Caudate",
    "Left-Putamen",
    "Right-Putamen",
    "Left-Hippocampus",
    "Right-Hippocampus"
  )
```

```{r}
# need to pivot everything
midlife_CT_lmperm_pivoted <- midlife_CT_lmperm %>% pivot_longer(cols = "lh_postcentral":"Right-Hippocampus",names_to = "ROI", values_to = "CorticalThickness")
midlife_CT_lmperm_pivoted$ROI = factor(midlife_CT_lmperm_pivoted$ROI,
                         levels=unique(midlife_CT_lmperm_pivoted$ROI))

```

```{r}
library(lmPerm)
# 
# model <- midlife_CT_lmperm_pivoted %>% lmp(loop_ae_avg_degree ~ CorticalThickness, perm = "Prob" )
```


## Boot strapping approach for this 

I'm following an online tutorial here:https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/boot.pval/vignettes/boot_summary.html

```{r}
# library(boot.pval)
```

```{r}
# model <- lm(mpg ~ hp + vs, data = mtcars)
# boot_summary(model, R = 9999, adjust.method = "holm") %>% summary_to_gt()
```
